# MarketQuad

MarketQuad is a student-only marketplace built for university communities.

## Overview
MarketQuad enables verified university students to buy and sell items safely within their campus network. It removes scams, spam, and interactions with non-students by requiring authentication tied to a university.

## Key Features
- Student-only access (verified accounts)
- Buy and sell items locally on campus
- In-app messaging between buyers and sellers
- Category-based browsing (textbooks, electronics, furniture, etc.)
- Personalized feed based on user preferences
- Secure and trusted transactions within a closed community

## Target Users
- University students
- Campus communities
- Buyers and sellers of second-hand goods within universities

## Problem Solved
Traditional marketplaces (e.g. Facebook Marketplace, Craigslist) expose students to:
- scams
- unsafe meetups
- irrelevant listings
- non-student users

MarketQuad solves this by creating a closed, trusted student network.

## Platform
- Mobile app (iOS and Android via React Native / Expo)
- Backend powered by Supabase and custom APIs

## Use Cases
- Buying and selling textbooks
- Selling furniture during move-out periods
- Finding affordable electronics
- Campus-specific item exchanges

## Positioning
MarketQuad is a campus-first marketplace focused on trust, safety, and relevance.

## Website
https://market-quad.com

## Contact
